text_block_list.text:
I receive a phone call from Seiun Sky. She wants
to see me, so I head over to where she wants to
meet.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Dun duh-duh duuun! Congratulations! You have
been chosen as the hero!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That's right! You've been selected to participate in the hot new game Help Princess Sei Escape! It starts right now!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
As the hero, you must rescue the princess from
the Demon Lord's clutches!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Look! That's the scaaary Demon Lord right over
there. She's trying to kidnap me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sky! Pleeease come out! My very fate is resting on
this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Just a moment! A mere few seconds! Let me have
you so that luck may become mine—nothing
more!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Come on out, Sky—I mean, your majesty! I
entreat thee, guide me to the valleys of great
fortune!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hear that? For some reason, Fukukitaru wants to
make a good luck charm out of me!
choice_data_list: Why would she want to do that?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, she saw it all in a divination. It said
something like, "A soft and laid-back nap-lover
will bring you great luck!"
choice_data_list:
Why don't you just hang out with her for a
while?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
No way! Think about it for a second! If I hang with
her and good luck actually comes her way...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Praise be, great Sky! Praise be! Share your luck
with me forever!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You are truly the goddess of great fortune! Stand beside me as the second Shiraoki for the rest of my life—and my next life as well!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Aaaaagh! Help me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That's what'll happen—I swear! No doubt about it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Am I really destined to end up stuck in
Fukukitaru's room along with all her other
talismans and trinkets?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
She'll stick me on a cramped shelf and make me
hold my arms up like a lucky cat statue while she
prays to me every day... Ugh, I don't want that!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So, Trai—no, hero! Rescue me, please!
choice_data_list: What do you want me to do?
What do you want me to do?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The rules are simple—just tell me, Princess Sei,
what I have to do to escape from the Demon Lord
of Fortune!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, hero! I'm counting on you! We can get
through this if we work together!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, now that's my style... but I'm gonna need some specifics.
choice_data_list: You have to let yourself get caught.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ooooh really?

And so, our meeting begins as we hammer out a
strategy to get Seiun Sky out safely.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
All right, our plan's ready to go... Probably. Let's
get going!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah! There you are, Sky! My luckiest of chaaarms!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh nooo... She found meee...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Heh, good fortune is finally mine! Come, Sky!
Come to me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Fiiine... Geez, guess I gotta accept that it's my
fate to be...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: FREE! Hah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! Fortune has slipped through my fingers?!
C-come back to me, Skyyy!

Seiun Sky tears away at full speed when
Matikanefukukitaru lets her guard down,
successfully escaping.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Dun duh-duh duuun! You saved me from the
Demon Lord of Fortune! And you got the high
score!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...You were a pretty merciless hero though,
making me get caught first and all. I sure wasn't
expecting that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
There you go again, making a big deal out of
stuff. I was just following the rules is all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I did a pretty good job, huh? Especially
considering that my hero was making me do
bonkers stuff. Yep, great job by me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Still, it was all because I trusted you to beat the game, hehe.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oooh... Well, it's nice to have a simple plan, but isn't that a little too simple?
choice_data_list:
You have to pull out all the stops and do what
you do best.

You have to pull out all the stops and do what
you do best.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Aha, I see. How's about some details?

Seiun Sky and I hold a simple strategy meeting
and come up with a plan that best utilizes her skill
set.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
All right! So I've just gotta make use of a good ol'
runaway!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There you are! Found—whoa?! Wait up! My
fortuuune!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, come on! If you don't move it, your
lucky charm's gonna run right off into the sunset!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! I'm not letting you get away! Hold tight, my
precious charm—I'm coming for you right now!

And with that, Matikanefukukitaru desperately
chases after Seiun Sky...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Look at that! You're pretty speedy... but are you
sure you can keep it up?

In the end, Fukukitaru struggles to maintain her
pace, and Sky escapes without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Dun duh-duh duuun! You beat the game. That
plan of yours worked out niiiice and smoothly.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm shocked how you would go and up the danger
like that, though. I suppose you play games on
hard with self-imposed restrictions on top?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Still, we wouldn't have messed up Fukukitaru's
pace if we hadn't done things that way.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it turned out to be the perfect winning
strategy for us.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, since we won, I get to put some
experience points into my favorite stat! Doot
doot!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Da-dada-daaah! ♪ I leveled up! Heehee!
